name: my-earned-wings
description: Ein atmosphärisches Spiel über das Finden der eigenen Flügel - Golden Master Core 3.5.
author: Lassandriel

scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build-electron && electron-builder
scripts.build-exe: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist_electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist_electron" && npm run build && npm run build-electron && powershell -Command "Copy-Item package.json dist_electron/; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist_electron/public/img -Force; Copy-Item public/img/Game_icon.ico dist_electron/public/img/; Copy-Item -Recurse dist dist_electron/dist; electron-packager dist_electron My-earned-Wings --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=BUILDS --overwrite --asar --icon=dist_electron/public/img/Game_icon.ico"
